message:
🐛 Add confirmation dialog for Card History deletion (#10682)

* 🌱 Fix tsconfig ignoreDeprecations for TypeScript 6.0

Update ignoreDeprecations from '5.0' to '6.0' to match TypeScript 6.0.3.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

* 🐛 Add confirmation dialog for Card History deletion (#10661)

Add ConfirmDeleteDialog that appears before deleting individual history
entries or clearing all history. Prevents accidental data loss.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

---------
